visa_types.name: Student
visa_types.documents_required: For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months (https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months)
visa_types.visa_fees:
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee
Visa fee to be paid while submitting biometrics at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is 160 EUR or 80 EUR in case a foreigner admitted to full-time consecutive studies at a higher education institution pursuant to international treaties concluded by Lithuania, agreements concluded on behalf of ministries or Government bodies, other state institutions or bodies and within their competence with the relevant institutions of foreign countries
An additional VFS service fee will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.
visa_types.processing_time: An application for the temporary residence permit in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance and an application for changing a temporary residence permit and supporting documents must be submitted at least 1 month before the expiry of the temporary residence permit, but not earlier than 4 months in advance.
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months (https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months (https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months)

## Visa Fees
Visa fees and VFS Service Fee
Visa fee to be paid while submitting biometrics at the Visa Application Center. Visa fee is 160 EUR or 80 EUR in case a foreigner admitted to full-time consecutive studies at a higher education institution pursuant to international treaties concluded by Lithuania, agreements concluded on behalf of ministries or Government bodies, other state institutions or bodies and within their competence with the relevant institutions of foreign countries
An additional VFS service fee will be charged when you visit the Temporary Residence Permit application center. You will find more information on this fee under the “attend a center” tab
All paid consular and service fees are non-refundable despite of the decision.

## Documents Required
For more information about this category, please refer to the MIGRIS website https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months (https://www.migracija.lt/stay-more-than-3-months)

## Processing Time
An application for the temporary residence permit in general procedure with the accompanying documents must be submitted at least 2 months in advance and an application for changing a temporary residence permit and supporting documents must be submitted at least 1 month before the expiry of the temporary residence permit, but not earlier than 4 months in advance.
